verses.text: Hakaliah' tapa Nehemiah' thugen hih bang ahi hi. A kum sawmnihna Khislev kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa-ah ka omlaitakin

ka sanggampa Hanani leh midang pawlkhat Judah gam panin hong tung uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Jerusalem khua thu leh sala matna panin a suakta ahi a omsuak Judah mite' thu tawh kisai amaute kiangah ka dong hi
Salsuahna panin a suakta, tua gama omsuakte in haksatna lianpi leh maizumna a ngahna uh, leh Jerusalem kulh kicimin kulhkongpite mei in a kattumna thu a hong gen uh hi
Hih thu ka zak ciangin tusukin ka kap niloh a, ni tampi sung an tangin, vantung Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi
Ka thungetna-ah, “Aw vantung Pasian, Topa, nang hong itin na thupiakna a zuite tungah thuciamna limtakin a zui, a lian a kihtakhuai Pasian aw

Israel mi ahi na nasemte' tangin sun leh zanin kong thunget nilohna a ngai dingin na bil hong ngat in la, na mit hong hak in. Nangma tungah ko Israel mite ka khialhna uh, keimah leh ka pu ka pate zong ka khialhna uh ahi ka mawhnate uh kong pulak uh hi
Nangma tungah kong khialkhin uh a, na nasempa Moses tungah na piak ahi thupiaknate, thukhamte, leh ngeina kipte ka zui kei uh hi
Na nasem Moses tungah, ‘Na cihtak kei uh leh minam dangte lakah kong thehthang ding hi

Ahi zongin kei kiangah hong ciahkikin ka thupiaknate zui-in na sep uh leh leimong dongah a kithehthangsa na mite uh kaikhawmin keima min omna dingin ka teelnasa munah amaute ka ciahpih ding hi,’ ci-a na thugen hong phawkkik in
Topa aw, amaute pen na vangliatna leh a thahat na khut tawh na hotkhiatsa na nasemte leh nangma mite ahi uh hi

Keima hong thungetna leh nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemte' thungetna na bil hong ngat in. Tu-in kei tungah mavan'na hong pia in la, kei tungah hih kumpipa hong migitna ding lungsim hong guan' in,” ka ci hi. Tua hun laitakin kei pen kumpipa' an a piapa ka hi hi.
